title: polygala ehlersii
intro: Polygala ehlersii, also known as the Chinese senega or root of the poor cow, is a type of flowering plant in the family Polygalaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving coughs and respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of gastrointestinal problems. In herbal preparations, Polygala ehlersii is often used in combination with other herbs, and can be administered in the form of decoctions, infusions, or dried root powder.
